name: Here ya go, have a plushy Giratina.
description: Just decided to make something wholesome and not horny, so here’s a plush version of Giratina. You can hug, squeeze or talk to him (even tho he can’t talk since they are a plush, they can express themselves). So uh yeah, have a good time with a plushy Giratina if you want to take him, but he will follow you if you don’t take him.
creator: Abbie FPE (apple boy)
